mapper.select: SELECT uhd.blood_sugar_level FROM userhealthdata uhd WHERE uhd.meal_status = '전' AND uhd.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY uhd.date DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT ingredient_name FROM useringredients WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(allergies, '$') AS allergies FROM users WHERE id = #{user_id}
